message.content:
[GAS TOWN] deacon <- daemon • 2026-02-23T22:08 • patrol

I am Deacon. Start patrol: run gt deacon heartbeat, then check gt hook. If no hook, create mol-deacon-patrol wisp and execute it.

content.thinking:
The hooked patrol wisp has all children already closed (✓). This means the previous patrol cycle completed all steps. I should check `bd mol current` to see if there's a next step, but since all children are closed, this patrol is complete.

I need to squash this wisp and create a new patrol.

content.text: All steps in this patrol wisp are already complete. Squashing and starting a fresh patrol cycle.

input.command: gt mol squash --jitter 10s --summary="Prior patrol complete: all steps closed by previous session"
input.description: Squash completed patrol wisp to digest
